anomalies.message: REQ-010 uses the maintainer-approved Markdown source solutions/2024/math2_2024.md; the origin PDF is not a prerequisite.

A visible user feedback path requires maintainer configuration of VITE_FEEDBACK_EMAIL before launch; no feedback email was present in repo config.
